title: NeonPay
body:
# 💸 NeonPay  
> A blazing-fast, Vault-compatible payment system for Minecraft servers  
> **Version:** 1.0 • **Supports:** 1.8 – 1.21+ • **Storage:** SQLite & MySQL  
> **Does not Require Vault**

---

## ✅ Features

- ⚡ **Async & Lag-Free** – Fully asynchronous and optimized for performance  
- 📦 **Lightweight** – Zero bloat. Only the core economy features you need  
- 🧩 **MySQL + SQLite Support** – Choose your backend freely  
- 🔐 **Safe & Secure** – Proper concurrency-safe transactions  
- 🧰 **Minimal Setup** – Configure in seconds and you're ready to go  
- 🧪 **1.8 to 1.20+ Support** – Compatible across a wide range of server versions

---

## 💻 Commands & Permissions

/pay <player> <amount>      # Send money to another player      | neonpay.pay
/balance                    # View your balance                 | neonpay.balance
/balancetop                 # View top balances leaderboard     | neonpay.top
/eco give/take/set <user>   # Admin economy control             | neonpay.admin

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Drop `neonpay.jar` into your `/plugins` folder.
2. Start or restart your server.
3. Edit the `config.yml` to set your currency name, prefix, or database type.
4. Done! Start using `/pay`, `/balance`, and `/balancetop`.

---

🔌 Plugin Compatibility

- Vault (✅)
- EssentialsX (✅)
- Jobs Reborn (✅)
- ShopGUI+, ChestShop, QuickShop (✅)
- LuckPerms (✅)
- All Vault-compatible economy plugins (✅)

---

## 📬 Support

Need help or have a suggestion?
Join our Discord: https://dsc.gg/neonstudios
